title: dendrorkis extinctoria
side_effects: Dendrorkis extinctoria can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. In rare cases, the improper use of Dendrorkis extinctoria can cause cardiac problems, including irregular heartbeats and decreased blood pressure. Additionally, long-term exposure to the plant's toxins may impair cognitive function and memory in some users.
